name: Smallpox Inoculation
description: Smallpox outcomes for inoculated vs not. Historical data. n=6,224.

context.nullClaim: inoculation has no effect on smallpox outcomes

studyDescription: Historical data on smallpox inoculation outcomes. Records whether individuals who were inoculated or not inoculated contracted smallpox. This is observational data — individuals chose whether or not to be inoculated.

variableDescriptions.result: Whether the individual contracted smallpox (lived or died)
variableDescriptions.inoculated: Whether the individual was inoculated against smallpox

sourceDetail: Historical smallpox inoculation records. Dataset from OpenIntro (smallpox).
